things.name: Colca Canyon
things.description: World's second deepest canyon - watch Andean condors soar on thermals at Cruz del Condor

things.name: Santa Catalina Monastery
things.description: A city within a city - 16th-century convent occupied by cloistered nuns for 400 years

things.name: Plaza de Armas
things.description: The finest colonial square in Peru framed by the sillar white volcanic stone cathedral

things.name: Juanita (Lady of Ampato) Museum
things.description: 500-year-old Inca ice maiden sacrificed on Ampato volcano - perfectly preserved

things.name: Yanahuara Viewpoint
things.description: Colonial arched viewpoint with Arequipa and the El Misti volcano backdrop

things.name: Sabandía Mill Countryside
things.description: 18th-century water mill in Sabandía valley 8km from the city

things.name: Molino de Sabandia & Picanteria
things.description: Traditional Arequipan restaurant in the countryside with guinea pig roasting

things.name: Toro Muerto Petroglyphs
things.description: World's largest concentration of petroglyphs in a volcanic ash desert

things.name: El Misti Volcano Trek
things.description: Two-day climb of the 5,822m perfect cone volcano overlooking the city

things.name: Rocoto Relleno
things.description: Arequipa's signature dish - stuffed rocoto pepper with beef and cheese, baked in oven
